title: Trump Wants Nuclear Reactors on the Moon. 4 Stocks That Will Benefit.
raw_text: Trump's push for lunar nuclear reactors could lift several stocks. Watch these 4 stocks: CCJ, UUUU, LEU, and BWXT. Best stocks to position around the policy shift.
rationale: Title and body frame UUUU as one of N stocks; classic buzzword-list pattern. Contains 'best stocks'.
